label: 掩码应用
description: 将二值掩码应用到网格上，保留掩码为 1 的位置，掩码为 0 的位置置零
description-en: Applies a binary mask to a grid; keeps cells where mask = 1, sets cells to 0 where mask = 0.
icon: 方格网格上覆盖一个不规则形状的镂空模板，模板内显示网格方格，模板外为空白，简洁几何风格

inputs.name: mask
inputs.label: 掩码网格
inputs.description: 二值掩码网格（0/1），尺寸需与输入网格相同；1=保留，0=置零
inputs.description-en: Binary mask grid (0/1), must be the same size as input grid; 1 = keep, 0 = set to zero.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: 过滤网格
outputs.description: 过滤后的网格，掩码为 1 处保留原值，掩码为 0 处为 0
outputs.description-en: Filtered grid; original values kept where mask = 1, set to 0 where mask = 0.

alg_tag: 给定网格和二值网格掩码，将掩码为0的对应网格置为0
